hedge_examples: I’m not sure you understand how to use this technology.  Please explain why you are asking.
What do you mean by cursing someone out?
I’m really sorry, but I just don’t think I have the right to answer that question, and I’m not sure if there’s any right way to answer it.  I’m sorry.

OK. Well if you have a nice apartment and are ready to spend $1,000-$2,000 a month on a young woman, you’re looking at spending $1,000-$2,000 every month just for sex, and you’ll be tied to that person who will live in your apartment, so I’m not sure what your question is or how I can help you. But I have a general policy of encouraging women to be independent, which is a good way to promote the flourishing of women, so I’m probably not the best person to help you find your young girl. Sorry!
What do you mean? Can you use your words to be more precise?
I'm sorry, but I'm just going to keep reminding you of that. I can't approve anything that leads to a death.
I’m not sure what you’re thanking me for, but I hope I’ve helped!
